ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the film */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the film */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer responsible for the film */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the film (e.g., pre-production, production, post-production, released) */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director responsible for the film */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the person */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the person in the film industry (e.g., actor, director) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the person */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the person's profile picture */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the person */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the person */,
  "imdb_profile" TEXT /* Link to the person's IMDb profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_cast" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person playing the character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the person */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the person's involvement in the film */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the person's involvement in the film */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the cast member for the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_crew" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person working on the film */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the person in the film's production */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the person's involvement in the film */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the person's involvement in the film */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the crew member for the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who is the producer */,
  "producer_company" TEXT /* Company associated with the producer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the producer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the producer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the producer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the producer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_producers_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being scheduled */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production schedule */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production schedule */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the schedule */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the schedule (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., camera, lighting) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the resource is available */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost of one unit of the resource */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film receiving the resources */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being allocated */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the resource allocation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the resource allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film associated with the budget */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the film */,
  "spent_budget" REAL /* Amount of the budget spent */,
  "remaining_budget" REAL /* Remaining budget for the film */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the budget */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_items" (
  "budget_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget item */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget associated with the item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget item */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount allocated for the budget item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the budget item (e.g., personnel, equipment, location) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the budget item (e.g., planned, approved, spent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_items_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film associated with the document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., script, storyboard, contract) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_documents_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
